title: cyclorhiza edosmoides
intro: Cyclorhiza edosmoides, also known as the Coralroot or Coral-root, is a species of orchid native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral compounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, and its roots are used to make a decoction that can be used to treat various ailments.
